message:
fix(clippy): derive Default for enums, remove useless format!

Replace manual Default impls for TelemetrySource, RedactionLabel, and
HealthStatus with #[derive(Default)] + #[default] attribute on the
variant. Replace useless format!() with .to_string() in
ux_scenario_validation render().

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
